G0.label:
case succ
α : Type u_1
β : Type u_2
f : α → β
a : α
n✝ : Nat
a✝ : map f (replicate n✝ a) = replicate n✝ (f a)
⊢ map f (replicate (n✝ + 1) a) = replicate (n✝ + 1) (f a)

G1.label:
α : Type u_1
β : Type u_2
f : α → β
a : α
n : Nat
a_1 : map f (replicate n a) = replicate n (f a)
⊢ map f (replicate (n + 1) a) = replicate (n + 1) (f a)
